posts.text:
Jon Favreau on what $200 billion could buy us instead of Trump's war with Iran.

Video

Trump's war is causing huge economic consequences, but his administration is too out of touch to be able to talk about it.

Video

Jon Favreau on AIPAC.

Video

Why the f*ck was Tulsi Gabbard in Fulton County?

Video

Either the intelligence community didn’t brief Trump, or they did and he ignored it. Either way is pretty bad.

Video

“I don’t care what she said,” –Donald Trump on Tulsi Gabbard’s intelligence assessment.

Video

Here’s what $200 billion could buy instead of funding war in Iran:
• Obamacare subsidies for 22 million people for 6 years
• Food stamps for 42 million people for 2 years
• Free school lunches for every kid for 5 years

Video

Tulsi Gabbard does what she can to try to pass the buck.

Video

Trump accuses media companies of committing treason for reporting on the war with Iran.

Video

Everyone is calling Trump nowadays, so we gave him a ring to see how he's doing.

Video

Trump’s nomination to replace Kristi Noem is Senator Markwayne Mullin, a man who has made millions stock-trading while in office.

Video

JD Vance isn’t going to be able to run away from Trump’s War in Iran.

Video

Trump's getting pounded on his war with Iran.

Video

“When she announced Tim Walz…I showed up in Philly that night. I announced them to my hometown crowd, and I campaigned all across the country for the two of them and worked my tail off to help them get elected.” — Gov. Josh Shapiro on supporting Kamala Harris and Tim Walz

Video

“Just because I disagree with Benjamin Netanyahu doesn't make me an antisemite, in as much as because I disagree with Donald Trump, doesn't make me any less of an American patriot." — Gov. Josh Shapiro

Video

“Pete Hegseth is wildly incompetent. He’s like an eight year old playing with toy soldiers every day.” — Gov. Josh Shapiro

Video

The DOGE-bags's deposition reveals a lot. Credit to @404mediaco for finding the clip.

Video

Is the SAVE America Act doomed to fail?

Video

Let's hope Joe Rogan can bring this energy into the 2028 election.

Video

Did Trump stumble ass backward into World War III?

Video
